item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses to open another access-control handling channel, recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream queue/route/entry splits across the prior examples, and moves upstream to unified intake, escalation ownership, routing criteria, and blockage removal.
